name: RNELineChart
description: Unified line chart component supporting all variations: default, interactive, multiple, linear, step, dots, dots-colors, and custom-label configurations

data.name: data
data.description: Chart data. Single series (number[]), single with labels ([string|number, number][]), or multiple series (Array<{name?: string, data: number[] | [string|number, number][]}>). Example: [100, 200, 150] or [[0, 100], [1, 200]] or [{name: 'Series A', data: [100, 200]}]

step.name: step
step.description: Step mode when type='step'. Options: 'start', 'middle', 'end', or false.

stack.name: stack
stack.description: Stack ID for stacking multiple series. Use false to disable. Example: 'total'

stackNormalize.name: stackNormalize
stackNormalize.description: When true with stack, show stacked values as percentages (0–100%). Default: false

symbol.name: symbol
symbol.description: Symbol type for data points. Options: 'none', 'circle', 'rect', 'roundRect', 'triangle', 'diamond', 'pin', 'arrow'. Default: 'none'

symbolSize.name: symbolSize
symbolSize.description: Size of the symbol. Number, [width, height], or function. Example: 6

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Default: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Default: 350

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override for customizing chart appearance. Merged with default theme from ChartThemeContext.

colors.name: colors
colors.description: Colors for the chart series. Overrides theme colors. Example: ['#3b82f6', '#10b981', '#f59e0b']

boundaryGap.name: boundaryGap
boundaryGap.description: Whether to leave gaps at the start and end of the axis. Default: false

minX.name: minX
minX.description: Optional minimum for the chart X-axis. When omitted, the scale is derived from data or chosen automatically.

maxX.name: maxX
maxX.description: Optional maximum for the chart X-axis. When omitted, derived or automatic.

intervalX.name: intervalX
intervalX.description: Optional tick interval for the chart X-axis. When omitted, automatic.

minY.name: minY
minY.description: Optional minimum for the Y value axis. When omitted, derived or automatic.

maxY.name: maxY
maxY.description: Optional maximum for the Y value axis. When omitted, derived or automatic.

intervalY.name: intervalY
intervalY.description: Optional tick interval for the Y value axis. When omitted, automatic. Not used when stackNormalize shows 0–100% across multiple series.

showXAxis.name: showXAxis
showXAxis.description: Whether to show the X-axis line and labels. Default: true

showXAxisTicks.name: showXAxisTicks
showXAxisTicks.description: X-axis tick marks when showXAxis is true. Default: true

showYAxis.name: showYAxis
showYAxis.description: Whether to show the Y-axis line and labels. Default: true

showYAxisTicks.name: showYAxisTicks
showYAxisTicks.description: Y-axis tick marks when showYAxis is true. Default: true

showXAxisSplitLines.name: showXAxisSplitLines
showXAxisSplitLines.description: Whether to show vertical grid lines. Default: true

showYAxisSplitLines.name: showYAxisSplitLines
showYAxisSplitLines.description: Whether to show horizontal grid lines. Default: true

xAxisLabel.name: xAxisLabel
xAxisLabel.description: Label text for the X-axis (displayed along the axis).

yAxisLabel.name: yAxisLabel
yAxisLabel.description: Label text for the Y-axis (displayed along the axis).

grid.name: grid
grid.description: Grid positioning. Values: percentages (e.g. '10%') or pixels. Example: {left: '10%', right: '5%', bottom: '10%', top: '10%'}

showLegend.name: showLegend
showLegend.description: Whether to display a legend for named series. Default: true

legendPosition.name: legendPosition
legendPosition.description: Placement of the legend: 'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right'. Top and bottom use a horizontal legend with wrapping; left and right use a vertical legend. Default: 'bottom'

showHighlighter.name: showHighlighter
showHighlighter.description: Whether to show the highlighter (emphasis) when interacting with the chart. Default: true

tooltip.name: tooltip
tooltip.description: Built-in React Native axis-tooltip overlay when renderTooltip is omitted: card (default), compact, kpi, striped, or none to hide the overlay.

renderTooltip.name: renderTooltip
renderTooltip.description: Optional (params) => ReactNode for the RN tooltip body at the pointer. When set, replaces the layout chosen by tooltip. Params: category axis value, dataIndex, per-series rows (name, value, color, seriesIndex), pointerX and pointerY in chart pixel space.

xAxisTickLabelFormatter.name: xAxisTickLabelFormatter
xAxisTickLabelFormatter.description: Formatter for X-axis tick labels. (value, index?) => string

yAxisTickLabelFormatter.name: yAxisTickLabelFormatter
yAxisTickLabelFormatter.description: Formatter for Y-axis tick labels. (value, index?) => string
